caption: The video captures a professional interview taking place at MongoDB World 2022, held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. Two men, both dressed in suits, are seated at a small round table equipped with a laptop and some documents. The man on the right is actively speaking, using hand gestures to emphasize his points, while the man on the left listens attentively, occasionally nodding. The background shows a spacious conference hall with other attendees walking around, indicating a busy event environment. The setting suggests a formal discussion, likely centered around topics related to MongoDB or technology advancements, as part of the conference's agenda.
